title: Department Store Announcement
transcript: Good afternoon, shoppers. Welcome to Westfield Mall. We would like to inform you that our annual summer sale will begin this Saturday at 9 AM. All items in the store will be discounted by up to forty percent. Electronics and jewelry will have separate discounts. Our electronics department on the third floor is offering twenty percent off selected laptop models and headphones. Additionally, customers who sign up for our membership card today will receive an extra five percent off their first purchase. The sale will run until Sunday evening. We look forward to seeing you there.

questions.stem: When does the summer sale begin?
questions.explanation: The announcement states the sale will begin this Saturday at 9 AM.

questions.stem: What is offered in the electronics department?
options: Twenty percent off selected laptops and headphones
Buy one get one free on all items
questions.explanation: The announcement mentions the electronics department is offering twenty percent off selected laptop models and headphones.

questions.stem: What benefit does the membership card provide?
options: An extra five percent off the first purchase
questions.explanation: Customers who sign up for the membership card today will receive an extra five percent off their first purchase.
